name: Cloud Snapshot Exfiltration Detection
description: Detects unauthorized sharing or copying of cloud snapshots (EBS, RDS, disk snapshots) to external accounts. Riggs AI analyzes the snapshot sharing event to determine if it represents data exfiltration via snapshot. Confirmed exfiltration triggers immediate removal of external sharing permissions, investigation of the actor and all shared snapshots, incident ticket creation, and emergency team notification. Authorized sharing receives documentation.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of snapshot sharing findings and API for managing snapshot permissions

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for confirmed snapshot exfiltration

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Emergency notification to security team of snapshot exfiltration

config.description: Triggers when a cloud snapshot (EBS, RDS, or disk) is shared with an external account or made public

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate snapshot sharing: is the target account in our organization, does the snapshot contain sensitive data, is the sharing actor authorized for snapshot management, is this a known exfiltration technique
config.description: AI-powered analysis of snapshot sharing to determine if it represents data exfiltration via cloud snapshot sharing to an attacker-controlled account
Routes based on whether the AI assessment confirmed snapshot exfiltration

parameters.reason: Snapshot exfiltration detected — removing all external sharing permissions

config.description: Immediately revoke the external account's access to the snapshot and make it private

config.query: CloudTrail ModifySnapshotAttribute and ModifyDBSnapshotAttribute events by actor={{trigger_1.alert.actor}} in last 30 days: all snapshots shared, target accounts, snapshot sizes, associated volumes/instances
config.description: Investigate the actor to find all snapshots they have shared externally to determine the full scope of potential data exfiltration

config.additional_instructions: Summarize the snapshot exfiltration incident: what data was exposed, how many snapshots were shared, blast radius, and recommended next steps for leadership
config.description: Generate an executive summary of the snapshot exfiltration incident for leadership briefing
Create a critical incident ticket with full exfiltration scope and executive summary
Send emergency notification to the security team about the snapshot exfiltration

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (data_exfil template). Snapshot sharing determined to be authorized — target account is within the organization trust boundary. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that the snapshot sharing was determined to be authorized
Cloud snapshot exfiltration detection and response complete
